title: Gemini-CLI runtime fitting (capability secondary, incl. image) — GeminiAdapter over `gemini -p` + image-delegation artifact path

tests.summary: 5 passed — buildArgs: `gemini -m <model> -y -p ''` (headless), prompt via STDIN (never argv); scrapeArtifactPaths pulls image paths from output; passes the RuntimeAdapter conformance harness (stub exec); feeds the prompt via stdin not argv; the primary delegates an IMAGE task to the Gemini runtime and receives the image artifact path /workspace/out/logo.png (gemini-runtime-ok). Full suite 585 passed / 9 skipped / 0 failed.

e2e.summary: N/A — capability delegation asserted via env/args + stub exec (brief: no live round-trip required); committed tests + --probe are the gate.

blockers: Live gemini image generation is asserted via the artifact-path scrape + stub exec (brief permits asserting delegation via env/args, no real provider call). A live gemini -p round-trip is available via the bridge CLI but not run in the gated suite.
notes: gemini-runtime is the CAPABILITY secondary — there is NO separate image skill; the orchestrator's image/video roles resolve to secondary:gemini (the seed routing.json maps image/video → sec-gemini). GeminiAdapter implements the RuntimeAdapter contract over `gemini -p` (headless, prompt via stdin — shell-injection safe), scrapes generated artifact paths (png/jpg/mp4/…) from output into the delegation `artifacts`. Mirrors the codex-runtime shape (shared runtime-bridge core, shared `runtime` capability kind). Completes the BRIEF v4 adapter trio: Claude Code (primary, multi-provider, both faces) + Codex (coding secondary) + Gemini (capability secondary). Satisfies brief §3 token gemini-runtime-ok.
